steps.name: db-content-model-contract
steps.summary: Added a dependency-free DB content model contract for posts, post_versions, post_sources, and publish_jobs, including version content hashing and current published version checks.

steps.name: published-route-boundary
steps.summary: Added public route selectors that expose only published posts with their current post_version and keep preview/admin statuses out of public lookups.

steps.name: markdown-html-version-boundary
steps.summary: Added canonical Markdown-to-sanitized-HTML content creation, content_hash integrity checks, and guarded crawler Markdown rendering for post_versions.

steps.name: blog-public-routes-and-md-endpoint
steps.summary: Connected DB-contract public blog data to /blog, /blog/[slug], and /blog/:slug.md with a shared published-only boundary, public HTTPS source links, and Markdown-derived safe render blocks.

steps.name: public-blog-index-surface
steps.summary: Added a published-only blog index surface with dates, summaries, tags, tag counts, and pagination while keeping search out of this phase.

steps.name: minimal-admin-preview-save-publish
steps.summary: Added a non-routed minimal admin workflow contract for preview, save, publish, public HTTPS source URL validation, and admin action audit logs; no public admin route was exposed because access control is not decided.
